---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to the orchestration protocol
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the situation where the current protocol falls short.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change you would like. Be specific about which section(s) of the protocol would change.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is this one better?

## Real-World Context

Have you encountered this in actual Claude Code usage? Describe the scenario.

## Additional Context

Any other information, screenshots, or examples that help explain the request.
